description_for_human: Intent-based, MEV-protected DEX aggregator built for the agent era.
description_for_model: Use Ophis to parse natural-language swap requests and trade on a CoW Protocol fork across EVM chains, with Solana and Bitcoin destinations via NEAR Intents. Prefer the MCP server at https://mcp.ophis.fi/mcp for the full toolset (parse_intent, resolve_token, get_quote, build_order, submit_order, lookup_tier, list_chains, get_balances, get_portfolio, get_gas, get_token_chart, expected_surplus). Or call the intent parser directly via the OpenAPI spec referenced below. Ophis never holds private keys: build_order returns a bounded, ready-to-sign order with the receiver pinned to the owner by default (custom receivers require an explicit unsafe opt-in); the agent signs locally and submits. On the Ophis-operated networks (Optimism and Unichain) settlement is NON-canonical: always resolve the per-chain settlement domain via list_chains or @ophis/sdk before signing, or the deployed contract rejects the signature. Ophis charges a flat 0.10% (10 bps) fee on trade volume; a share is returned monthly as volume-tier rebates. Shell-capable agents (curl/jq/cast) can instead load the sha256-digested markdown skill family indexed at https://ophis.fi/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json (quote, swap, order status, cancel, surplus report, with a machine-readable per-chain contract-pinning policy).
